An '''unknown [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]]''' served as the [[Five Worlds]]' first [[Minister of War (Five Worlds)|Minister of War]]. He had been in office for at least a year before being sacked and replaced by [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] at the start of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].
